message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["{\"X\": [[\"A\", 5, {}], [\"B\", 5, {}]], \"A\": [[\"T\", 5, {}], [\"A\", 1, {\"traffic\": 1.0}]], \"B\": [[\"T\", 5, {}]], \"T\": []}","[[\"B\", \"S\", {\"traffic\": 1.1}], [\"X\", \"A\", {\"traffic\": 1.0}]]","8"],"focus":"equal-cost tie with lexicographic full-path tie-break; includes a self-loop and an ignored update to a non-existent edge"},{"input_lines":["{\"P\": [[\"Q\", 0, {}]], \"Q\": [[\"P\", 0, {}], [\"T\", 1, {}]], \"A\": [[\"B\", 3, {\"time_window_start\": 0, \"time_window_end\": 6}], [\"T\", 2, {\"time_window_end\": 24}]], \"B\": [[\"T\", 5, {}]], \"T\": []}","[[\"Q\", \"T\", {\"traffic\": 0.5}]]","23"],"focus":"time-window boundaries (inclusive) and end=24 validity; zero-cost cycle between P and Q to ensure no infinite loops"},{"input_lines":["{\"S\": [[\"M\", 10, {\"traffic\": 1.2, \"capacity_tier\": 2}], [\"N\", 5, {}], [\"T\", 14, {}]], \"M\": [[\"T\", 5, {\"maintenance\": 0.8}]], \"N\": [[\"T\", 10, {\"time_window_start\": 9, \"time_window_end\": 17}]], \"T\": []}","[[\"S\", \"M\", {\"traffic\": 1.0}], [\"S\", \"M\", {\"capacity_tier\": 1}], [\"X\", \"Y\", {\"traffic\": 2.0}]]","9"],"focus":"overlapping updates merging (key-wise override), tie between direct and two-step routes resolved lexicographically; includes an ignored update for unknown edge"}]}
